name: SUS
short_description: SUS : Survivors Under Space is 80s arcade inspired rougelite space shooter. Defend yourself from endless enemies. Select your weapons carefully and grab items to manipulate time and space, blow up the asteroids, and shoot down the enemies. Leave no survivors.
detailed_description:
SUS : Survivors Under Space is 80s arcade inspired rougelite space shooter. Struggle your way through swarm of the alien ships and carefully select your weapons. Shoot down enemies coming from all directions. Break down asteroids to get additional upgrade parts. But be careful: direct collision with an asteroid will cause serious damage to your ship. They are getting stronger and stronger... Dodge, shoot, break, make them explode, and survive under space. Until the sun rises.

Depending on your choice, more enemies pour out, and remove more than a certain number of enemies to advance to the next stage.

Supports both keyboard and controller.
